artists.name: Decal
artists.artistDescription: Decal is a dynamic alternative band blending punk energy with indie melodies. Known for their high-energy performances and catchy hooks, they have quickly gained a dedicated following in the local music scene.
artists.summary: New album out, looking for local shows

artists.name: Stone Echo
artists.artistDescription: Stone Echo is an alternative indie band with a punk edge. Their sound is characterized by driving rhythms and introspective lyrics.

artists.name: Midnight Static
artists.artistDescription: Midnight Static is a high-energy punk band known for their raw sound and electrifying live shows. With a growing fanbase, they are eager to hit the stage and share their music with new audiences.

artists.name: Velvet Voltage
artists.artistDescription: Velvet Voltage is an indie rock band known for their melodic sound and thoughtful lyrics. They bring a fresh perspective to the genre with their unique approach to songwriting and performance.

artists.name: Clark Nova
artists.artistDescription: Clark Nova is a dynamic alternative band blending punk energy with indie melodies. Known for their high-energy performances and catchy hooks, they have quickly gained a dedicated following in the local music scene.

artists.name: Carlos
artists.artistDescription: Carlos is a San Francisco band blending pop hooks, gritty guitars, and punk urgency into melodic songs built for singalongs and packed rooms. Their live set leans energetic, catchy, and a little rough around the edges in the best way.
artists.summary: Melodic pop-rock punk band looking for Bay Area and West Coast club dates

artists.name: Bob Sled
artists.artistDescription: Bob Sled is an all-girl pop-punk band out of Silver Lake with bright melodies, crunchy guitars, and quirky, catchy songs that land fast with live crowds. They balance fun hooks with sharp playing and a playful stage presence.
artists.summary: All-girl pop-punk band with catchy melodic songs and high-energy sets

artists.name: Lily Thompson
artists.artistDescription: Lily Thompson is a New York City folk singer with quirky songs, beautiful melodies, and a warm acoustic live show that lands equally well in listening rooms and intimate clubs. Her new album, One More Time, is bringing fresh attention to a growing fan base that already reaches all the way to Amsterdam.
artists.summary: NYC folk singer-songwriter with a new album, One More Time, and a strong Amsterdam following

artists.name: Chrome Deluxe
artists.artistDescription: Chrome Deluxe is a Burlingame band playing fun blues gigs and oldies-inspired sets with a laid-back bar-band feel. Their show mixes traditional songs, crowd-friendly grooves, and familiar staples like Mustang Sally for rooms that want a classic good-time night.
artists.summary: Burlingame blues and oldies band playing traditional songs and easygoing crowd favorites

artists.name: Osees
artists.artistDescription: Osees is a prolific Los Angeles-based rock band originally formed in San Francisco, known for blending garage rock, psychedelia, krautrock, and folk influences into intense, high-energy live shows with an off-kilter edge.
artists.summary: Prolific psych-garage rock band with explosive live sets and a long-running cult following

artists.name: The Not Yetis
artists.artistDescription: The Not Yetis is a San Francisco garage-rock band with a lo-fi DIY streak and a weirdly charming budget rock opera concept about mythical creatures adapting to human life. Their songs balance scrappy hooks, noisy energy, and offbeat storytelling.
artists.summary: SF garage-rock band with lo-fi energy, quirky mythic themes, and a 26-song debut LP

artists.name: Kingdom First
artists.artistDescription: Kingdom First is a scorching SF/PDX hard rock band known for high-energy, riff-heavy sets and a sharp edge shaped by punk and noise-rock roots. Reunited after a brief late-'90s and early-2000s run, the band has returned to Bay Area stages with tight layered guitars and a renewed Northwest touring push.
artists.summary: Reunited hard rock band with heavy riffs, punk pedigree, and explosive Bay Area live sets
